label: Banks (P/B + ROE focus)

deferred_concepts.reason: Net interest margin requires interest_income / interest_earning_assets — not standard US-GAAP XBRL tags
Non-performing-loan disclosure is bank supplemental, not in standard XBRL
Regulatory capital ratios disclosed in 10-K narrative + Federal Reserve filings, not standard XBRL

notes: Bank EBITDA is undefined (no operating-cash-flow concept of cash earnings); evEbitda intentionally absent. priceToSales also absent — banks don't have 'sales' in the same sense. forwardPE is a sell-side consensus pass-through (no primary source). ROE is the primary profitability lens for banks; tier1 capital and credit quality (deferred) drive equity multiples in conjunction.
